questions.question: Solar energy ka primary source kya hai?

options.B: Water

questions.explanation: Solar energy ka mukhya srot suraj (sun) hai.

questions.question: Solar panel install karte time kaun sa Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) sabse zaroori hai?

options.B: Helmet

questions.explanation: Height par kaam karte samay safety harness, aur general safety ke liye goggles aur helmet sabhi zaroori hain.

questions.question: Ek off-grid solar system mein electricity store karne ke liye kya use hota hai?

options.B: Batteries

questions.explanation: Off-grid system mein, jo grid se connect nahi hota, batteries energy store karti hain.

questions.question: Voltage ki unit kya hoti hai?

options.B: Watt

questions.explanation: Voltage ko 'Volt' mein measure kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Solar energy ke kya advantages hain?

options.B: Environment friendly

questions.explanation: Solar energy ek renewable, environment friendly aur low running cost wala energy source hai.

questions.question: DC current ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Dynamic Current

questions.explanation: DC ka matlab Direct Current hota hai, jo solar panels produce karte hain.

questions.question: Kaun sa tool electrical wires cut karne ke liye use hota hai?

options.B: Pliers/Wire cutter

questions.explanation: Pliers ya wire cutter electrical wires ko cut karne ke liye use hote hain.

questions.question: Solar panels ko roof par install karte samay, kis cheez ka dhyaan rakhna sabse zaroori hai?

options.B: Roof ki structural integrity

questions.explanation: Roof ki structural integrity check karna zaroori hai taaki woh panels ka weight bear kar sake.

questions.question: Kaun sa solar system grid se connected hota hai aur excess power ko grid mein feed kar sakta hai?

options.B: Hybrid system

questions.explanation: On-grid system utility grid se connected hota hai aur excess power feed-in kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Electrical shock se bachne ke liye kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Power supply disconnect karein

questions.explanation: Electrical shock se bachne ke liye insulated tools, power disconnect karna aur PPE pehenna sab zaroori hain.

questions.question: Power (P) ka formula kya hota hai, agar Voltage (V) aur Current (I) diye gaye hon?

options.B: P = V / I

questions.explanation: Electrical power ka formula P = V * I hota hai.

questions.question: Solar panel installation mein 'earthing' (grounding) kyun important hai?

options.A: System ki efficiency badhane ke liye
options.B: Lightning aur fault currents se safety ke liye
options.C: Panel ko clean rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Earthing system ko lightning strikes aur electrical faults se protect karta hai.

questions.question: Solar panel installation mein 'shading' ka kya impact hota hai?

options.B: Panel ka output power kam ho jaata hai
options.D: Panel ka weight kam ho jaata hai

questions.explanation: Shading se solar panel ka output power significantly kam ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Ek technician ko height par kaam karte samay kaun se safety measures lene chahiye?

options.B: Use a ladder without checking its stability
options.C: Use safety harness and secure fall protection

questions.explanation: Height par kaam karte samay safety harness aur fall protection ka use karna anivarya hai.

questions.question: Agar kisi solar system mein AC aur DC dono loads hon, toh kaun sa system prefer kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Off-grid system

questions.explanation: Hybrid system AC aur DC dono loads ko handle kar sakta hai, aur grid connection ke saath battery storage bhi provide karta hai.

questions.question: Solar panel installation ke time 'hot spots' kya hote hain aur inka kya nuksaan hai?

options.A: Panel ka garmi absorb karne ka point, efficiency badhata hai
options.B: Panel par zyada dhoop padne wala area, overheating aur damage kar sakta hai
options.C: Panel ke cooling points, panel ko thanda rakhte hain
options.D: Panel ke electrical connection points, jahan voltage sabse zyada hota hai

questions.explanation: Hot spots panel ke woh areas hain jahan zyada resistance ya shading ke kaaran heat build-up hota hai, jo panel ko permanently damage kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Ek technician ko electrical fire ki situation mein kaun sa fire extinguisher use karna chahiye?

options.B: Foam based extinguisher
options.C: CO2 or Dry Chemical (Class C) extinguisher

questions.explanation: Electrical fires (Class C) ke liye CO2 ya Dry Chemical fire extinguisher use karna chahiye, water based extinguishers electrical shock ka risk badha sakte hain.

questions.question: Solar panels kis principle par kaam karte hain?

options.B: Photovoltaic effect

questions.explanation: Solar panels photovoltaic effect ka upyog karke sunlight ko electricity mein convert karte hain.

questions.question: MC4 connectors ka use kis liye hota hai?

options.B: Solar panels ko series/parallel mein connect karne ke liye
options.C: Batteries ko connect karne ke liye
options.D: Inverter ko grid se connect karne ke liye

questions.explanation: MC4 connectors specifically solar panels ke DC wiring connections ke liye design kiye gaye hain.

questions.question: Kaun sa solar panel type sabse zyada efficient mana jaata hai?

options.B: Monocrystalline

questions.explanation: Monocrystalline panels generally sabse zyada efficiency provide karte hain.

questions.question: Solar panel ke piche jo junction box hota hai, usmein kya hota hai?

options.B: Batteries

questions.explanation: Junction box mein bypass diodes hote hain jo shading ke case mein current flow ko maintain karte hain.

questions.question: Solar cables ko UV radiation se bachane ke liye unmein kya feature hota hai?

options.B: Metallic shield

questions.explanation: Solar cables UV resistant insulation ke saath aate hain taaki woh dhoop mein kharab na hon.

questions.question: Solar panel ki nameplate par 'Pmax' kya indicate karta hai?

options.B: Maximum voltage

questions.explanation: Pmax ka matlab Maximum Power output hai jo panel standard test conditions (STC) par generate kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Solar panel ke mounting structure ka main purpose kya hai?

options.B: Panels ko sahi angle par hold karna aur secure rakhna
options.C: Panel se current flow ko control karna

questions.explanation: Mounting structure panels ko sahi tilt angle aur orientation par fix karta hai aur unhein weather se protect karta hai.

questions.question: Polycrystalline solar panels monocrystalline panels se kaise alag hote hain?

options.B: Yeh single crystal se bane hote hain
options.C: Yeh multiple silicon crystals se bane hote hain aur kam costly hote hain
options.D: Yeh sirf off-grid systems mein use hote hain

questions.explanation: Polycrystalline panels multiple silicon crystals se bante hain, jo unhein monocrystalline se kam efficient aur kam costly banata hai.

questions.question: Solar panel ki 'Voc' (Open Circuit Voltage) kya darshata hai?

options.B: Panel ka maximum voltage jab koi load connect na ho
options.C: Panel ka maximum power point voltage

questions.explanation: Voc woh maximum voltage hai jo panel generate karta hai jab usse koi load connect na ho aur current zero ho.

questions.question: Thin-film solar panels ke kya fayde hain?

options.B: Flexible aur lightweight ho sakte hain
options.C: Zyada space mein kam power output dete hain

questions.explanation: Thin-film panels flexible, lightweight hote hain aur kam light conditions mein bhi acha perform karte hain, although unki efficiency kam hoti hai.

questions.question: Solar panel installation mein 'string' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Kai panels ko parallel mein connect karna
options.C: Kai panels ko series mein connect karna
options.D: Panel ko roof par secure karne wali rope

questions.explanation: Ek string tab banti hai jab kai solar panels ko series mein connect kiya jaata hai taaki total voltage badh sake.

questions.question: Solar panel ki efficiency ko kaun se factors affect karte hain?

options.B: Panel ka physical size only

questions.explanation: Temperature, shading aur dust solar panel ki efficiency ko directly affect karte hain.

questions.question: Solar panel mein use hone wale 'bypass diodes' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Current ko reverse flow hone se rokna
options.C: Shaded cells se current ko bypass karna
options.D: Panel ko AC current mein convert karna

questions.explanation: Bypass diodes shaded ya damaged cells ko bypass karke string ke baki healthy cells se current flow maintain karte hain, jisse power loss kam hota hai.

questions.question: Solar panel ki 'Degradation Rate' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Panel ki physical appearance ka kharab hona
options.B: Panel ki efficiency ka time ke saath kam hona

questions.explanation: Degradation rate woh dar hai jis par solar panel ki power output efficiency har saal kam hoti hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko high current aur low voltage chahiye, toh panels ko kaise connect karenge?

options.B: Parallel mein

questions.explanation: Panels ko parallel mein connect karne se total current badhta hai jabki voltage same rehta hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa factor solar panel ke 'Temperature Coefficient' ko define karta hai?

options.A: Panel ka output power par temperature change ka asar
options.B: Panel ka resistance temperature ke saath
options.C: Panel ki physical size par temperature ka asar
options.D: Panel ka colour temperature ke saath

questions.explanation: Temperature Coefficient batata hai ki panel ka output power kitna change hoga jab uska operating temperature badlega ya kam hoga.

questions.question: Solar panel ke backsheet ka primary function kya hai?

options.B: Panel ko mechanical damage aur moisture se protect karna

questions.explanation: Backsheet panel ko moisture, UV radiation, aur physical damage se protect karta hai aur electrical insulation bhi provide karta hai.

questions.question: Site assessment karte samay sabse pehle kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Roof ki condition aur orientation

questions.explanation: Roof ki condition aur orientation solar panel installation ke liye critical factors hain.

questions.question: Solar panels ko kis direction mein install karna sabse beneficial hota hai India mein?

options.B: South

questions.explanation: India mein, panels ko South direction mein install karna maximum sunlight capture karta hai.

questions.question: Load calculation ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Ghar ki total electricity consumption estimate karna

questions.explanation: Load calculation se yeh pata chalta hai ki system ko kitni electricity generate karni hai, jisse system sizing mein help milti hai.

questions.question: Shading analysis ke liye kaun sa tool use hota hai?

options.B: Solar pathfinder ya shading analysis app

questions.explanation: Solar pathfinder ya specialized apps site par shading patterns ko analyze karne mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Roof-mounted system ke liye roof ka 'tilt angle' kis cheez par depend karta hai?

options.B: Panel ka brand

questions.explanation: Optimal tilt angle site ke latitude par depend karta hai taaki saal bhar maximum sunlight capture ho sake.

questions.question: Ek residential solar system ke liye average daily energy consumption kis unit mein measure ki jaati hai?

options.B: Kilowatt-hours (kWh)

questions.explanation: Daily energy consumption kilowatt-hours (kWh) mein measure ki jaati hai.

questions.question: Site survey ke dauran roof par 'obstructions' kya ho sakte hain?

options.B: Solar panels

questions.explanation: Chimney, trees aur aas-paas ki buildings shading create kar sakti hain, jo obstructions hain.

questions.question: Solar system design mein 'sizing' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Panels ka physical size determine karna
options.B: System ke components (panels, inverter, battery) ki capacity decide karna
options.C: Installation area ka size determine karna

questions.explanation: System sizing mein yeh decide kiya jaata hai ki kitne panels, kitni capacity ka inverter aur kitni capacity ki batteries required hain.

questions.question: Net metering kis type ke solar system mein commonly use hota hai?

options.B: Stand-alone system

questions.explanation: Net metering on-grid systems mein use hota hai jahan excess solar power grid ko export kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Agar kisi ghar mein AC consumption zyada hai, toh kaun sa inverter type prefer kiya jaayega?

options.B: Microinverter

questions.explanation: String inverter residential aur commercial AC loads ke liye commonly use hota hai, microinverters bhi AC output dete hain but har panel ke liye alag hote hain.

questions.question: Ek solar technician ko site assessment report mein kya include karna chahiye?

options.A: Roof dimensions, shading analysis, load calculation, proposed system layout
options.B: Sirf owner ka naam aur address

questions.explanation: Ek comprehensive site assessment report mein roof details, shading, load aur proposed system layout shamil hona chahiye.

questions.question: Solar system design mein 'redundancy' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: System mein backup components rakhna taaki ek fail hone par dusra kaam kar sake
options.C: System ko kam capacity ka banana
options.D: System ko sirf ek type ke load ke liye design karna

questions.explanation: Redundancy ka matlab hai system mein backup components rakhna taaki koi ek component fail hone par system continue kaam karta rahe.

questions.question: Agar roof ka orientation South-East hai, toh panels ko kaise adjust karenge maximum output ke liye?

options.B: South-East face karenge aur tilt angle adjust karenge

questions.explanation: Agar roof South-East oriented hai, toh panels ko usi direction mein lagayenge aur tilt angle ko optimize karenge taaki morning sun ka zyada fayda mile.

questions.question: Kisi site par high wind speed ka factor solar panel installation design mein kaise consider kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Panels ko kam tilt par lagana
options.B: Stronger mounting structures aur extra bracing use karna
options.D: Panels ko ground par install karna

questions.explanation: High wind areas mein, panels ko secure karne ke liye stronger mounting structures aur extra bracing ki zaroorat hoti hai.

questions.question: Ek hilly area mein jahan uneven terrain hai, wahan kaun sa mounting system prefer kiya jaayega?

options.B: Ground-mounted system with adjustable racks

questions.explanation: Uneven terrain par ground-mounted systems with adjustable racks zyada suitable hote hain taaki panels ko level aur optimal tilt par rakha ja sake.

questions.question: Agar customer ka future load increase ka plan hai, toh system design mein kya consideration lenge?

options.B: Modular design approach apnayenge taaki future mein panels aur components add kiye ja sakein
options.C: Sirf current load ke liye design karenge
options.D: Customer ko solar system install na karne ki salah denge

questions.explanation: Modular design future expansion ke liye flexibility provide karta hai, jahan additional panels aur components as needed add kiye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Solar system design mein 'balance of system' (BOS) components mein kya shamil hota hai?

options.B: Inverter aur batteries only
options.C: Mounting structures, wiring, inverters, disconnects, monitoring systems, etc.

questions.explanation: BOS mein panels ke alawa sabhi components shamil hote hain jaise mounting, wiring, inverters, safety devices, monitoring, etc.

questions.question: Solar panels install karne se pehle roof par kya check karna zaroori hai?

options.B: Roof ki waterproof integrity

questions.explanation: Roof ki waterproof integrity check karna zaroori hai taaki installation ke baad leakage na ho.

questions.question: Mounting rails ko roof par kis cheez se secure kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Bolts/Screws/Clamps

questions.explanation: Mounting rails ko bolts, screws ya clamps se roof rafters ya purlins par secure kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Solar panels ko rails par secure karne ke liye kaun se components use hote hain?

options.B: Mid-clamps aur End-clamps

questions.explanation: Mid-clamps panels ke beech mein aur End-clamps string ke end panels ko secure karte hain.

questions.question: DC cables ko sunlight se protect karne ke liye kya use karte hain?

options.B: Conduits ya cable trays

questions.explanation: Conduits ya cable trays cables ko physical damage aur UV exposure se protect karte hain.

questions.question: Solar panel installation ke baad sabse pehla electrical connection kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: DC voltage aur polarity

questions.explanation: DC voltage aur polarity check karna pehla step hai taaki system proper function kare aur damage na ho.

questions.question: Roof par panels utarte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Panels ko tezi se fekna chahiye
options.B: Lift ya rope system ka use karna chahiye
options.C: Panels ko ek ke upar ek rakhna chahiye
options.D: Panels ko bina support ke chhod dena chahiye

questions.explanation: Panels ko carefully lift ya rope system se utarna chahiye taaki damage na ho aur safety bani rahe.

questions.question: Ground-mounted solar system mein foundation kis cheez se banaya jaata hai?

options.B: Plastic

questions.explanation: Ground-mounted systems ke liye strong foundation concrete ya steel piles se banaya jaata hai.

questions.question: Solar panel installation mein 'stringing' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Panels ko series mein connect karna
options.C: Panels ko parallel mein connect karna

questions.explanation: Stringing ka matlab hai panels ko series mein connect karke ek high voltage DC circuit banana.

questions.question: Agar roof uneven hai ya uspar obstacles hain, toh panels ko kaise arrange karenge?

options.A: Sirf flat areas par install karenge
options.B: Obstacles ko ignore karenge
options.C: Custom mounting solutions aur careful panel layout design karenge

questions.explanation: Uneven roofs aur obstacles ke liye custom mounting solutions aur careful panel layout design karna padta hai taaki shading kam ho.

questions.question: Solar panel array ki proper earthing (grounding) kyun important hai?

options.A: System ki efficiency badhane ke liye
options.B: Electrical safety aur lightning protection ke liye
options.C: Panel ka weight kam karne ke liye
options.D: System ko zyada aesthetically pleasing banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Earthing electrical faults aur lightning strikes se system aur users ko protect karta hai.

questions.question: Solar panel installation mein 'conduit' ka kya role hai?

options.B: Electrical wires ko protect karna

questions.explanation: Conduit electrical wires ko physical damage, moisture aur UV rays se protect karta hai.

questions.question: Solar panels ko install karte samay 'torque wrench' ka use kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Fasteners ko over-tighten na karne ke liye
options.B: Fasteners ko loose rakhne ke liye
options.C: Panels ko adjust karne ke liye
options.D: Wires ko strip karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Torque wrench fasteners ko specified torque par tighten karne ke liye use hota hai, taaki over-tightening se damage na ho aur connection secure rahe.

questions.question: Solar array mein 'inter-row spacing' ka kya importance hai?

options.A: Panels ke beech mein jagah chhodna
options.B: Ek row ke panels ki shading dusri row par na pade
options.D: Cable management ke liye space banana

questions.explanation: Inter-row spacing is important to ensure that one row of panels does not shade the row behind it, especially during winter months.

questions.question: Flat roof par solar panels install karte samay kaun sa mounting system prefer kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Ballasted or tilted rack system

questions.explanation: Flat roofs par panels ko optimal tilt angle dene ke liye ballasted ya tilted rack systems use kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: Solar panel installation mein 'module-level power electronics' (MLPE) ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Sirf panel ke colour ko improve karta hai
options.B: Har panel ke output ko individually optimize karta hai, shading ke impact ko kam karta hai
options.C: System ka total weight kam karta hai

questions.explanation: MLPE (jaise microinverters ya power optimizers) har panel ke performance ko optimize karta hai, jisse shading ya mismatch ke effects kam hote hain.

questions.question: Agar aapko existing building par solar panels lagane hain, toh kis cheez ka detailed structural analysis zaroori hai?

options.B: Building ki foundation aur roof ki load-bearing capacity

questions.explanation: Existing building par panels lagane se pehle uski structural integrity aur load-bearing capacity ka detailed analysis zaroori hai.

questions.question: Solar panels ko install karte samay 'thermal expansion' ko kaise accommodate kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Panels ko tight-fit install karte hain
options.B: Mounting structures aur panels ke beech mein thoda gap chhodte hain
options.C: Panels ko sirf thande mausam mein install karte hain

questions.explanation: Thermal expansion aur contraction ko accommodate karne ke liye mounting structures aur panels ke beech mein thoda gap chhodna zaroori hai taaki material stress na ho.

questions.question: Inverter ka main function kya hai?

options.B: DC current ko AC current mein convert karna
options.C: AC current ko DC current mein convert karna

questions.explanation: Inverter solar panels se generate hone wale DC current ko ghar ke appliances ke liye usable AC current mein convert karta hai.

questions.question: Batteries ko solar system mein kyun use kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Extra power store karne ke liye for later use
options.C: System ka weight badhane ke liye
options.D: AC current generate karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Batteries excess solar energy ko store karti hain taaki use raat mein ya kam dhoop wale din use kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Kaun sa device battery ko overcharge hone se bachata hai?

options.B: Charge controller

questions.explanation: Charge controller battery ko overcharge ya deep discharge hone se protect karta hai, uski life badhata hai.

questions.question: Solar panel array mein 'DC Disconnect' switch ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: DC power flow ko manually stop karna for safety/maintenance

questions.explanation: DC Disconnect switch safety ke liye solar array aur inverter ke beech DC power ko isolate karta hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko total voltage badhana hai, toh panels ko kaise connect karenge?

options.B: Series mein

questions.explanation: Panels ko series mein connect karne se individual panel voltages add ho jaate hain, jisse total voltage badhta hai.

questions.question: Grid-tied inverter ko kahan install kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Batteries ke paas

questions.explanation: Grid-tied inverter ko electrical service panel ke paas install kiya jaata hai taaki woh grid se easily connect ho sake.

questions.question: Kaun sa battery type off-grid solar systems mein commonly use hota hai?

options.B: Lead-acid batteries

questions.explanation: Lead-acid batteries (jaise deep cycle batteries) off-grid solar systems mein cost-effective aur reliable option hain.

questions.question: String inverter aur microinverter mein kya difference hai?

options.A: String inverter har panel ke liye hota hai, microinverter poore string ke liye
options.B: String inverter poore string ke liye hota hai, microinverter har panel ke liye
options.D: Microinverter sirf DC output deta hai

questions.explanation: String inverter ek ya do strings of panels ko handle karta hai, jabki microinverter har individual panel ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Solar wiring mein 'gauge' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Wire ki length

questions.explanation: Wire gauge wire ke diameter ya thickness ko refer karta hai, jo current carrying capacity ko determine karta hai.

questions.question: Agar batteries ko series mein connect kiya jaaye, toh total voltage aur Ah rating par kya asar padega?

options.A: Voltage badhega, Ah rating same rahegi
options.B: Voltage same rahega, Ah rating badhegi

questions.explanation: Batteries ko series mein connect karne se voltage add hota hai, jabki Ah rating (capacity) same rehti hai.

questions.question: Hybrid inverter ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Sirf on-grid use hota hai
options.C: Grid-tied aur battery backup dono provide karta hai
options.D: Sirf DC loads ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Hybrid inverters grid se connect ho sakte hain aur batteries ko charge/discharge bhi kar sakte hain, jisse backup power milta hai.

questions.question: Solar system mein 'AC Disconnect' switch ka kya role hai?

options.B: Inverter ko AC grid se isolate karna

questions.explanation: AC Disconnect switch inverter ko AC grid se manually isolate karta hai, jo safety aur maintenance ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Lithium-ion batteries lead-acid batteries se kaise better hain solar applications mein?

options.B: Halki, zyada energy density, zyada life cycle, fast charging

questions.explanation: Lithium-ion batteries lightweight, high energy density, longer life cycle aur faster charging capabilities ke saath aati hain.

questions.question: MPPT charge controller ka kya fayda hai PWM charge controller ke upar?

options.B: Kam efficient hota hai
options.C: Solar panel se maximum power extract karta hai, especially in varying conditions
options.D: Sirf low power systems ke liye hai

questions.explanation: MPPT (Maximum Power Point Tracking) charge controllers solar panel se maximum available power extract karte hain, jisse overall system efficiency badhti hai.

questions.question: Agar inverter 'fault' dikha raha hai, toh pehla troubleshooting step kya hoga?

options.B: Power supply check karna, wiring connections inspect karna, error code dekhna
options.C: Customer ko complain karne ko kehna

questions.explanation: Inverter fault par power supply, wiring connections aur error code check karna pehla troubleshooting step hai.

questions.question: Solar system mein 'Arc Fault Circuit Interrupter' (AFCI) ka kya role hai?

options.B: Short circuit se bachana
options.C: Dangerous electrical arcs ko detect aur interrupt karna

questions.explanation: AFCI dangerous electrical arcs ko detect karta hai jo faulty wiring ya damaged insulation se ho sakte hain, aur fire risk ko kam karta hai.

questions.question: Solar panels ki routine maintenance mein kya shamil hai?

options.A: Panels ko har din change karna
options.B: Panels ko saaf karna aur visual inspection karna

questions.explanation: Routine maintenance mein panels ko dust aur debris se saaf karna aur physical damage ke liye inspect karna shamil hai.

questions.question: Agar solar system output kam de raha hai, toh kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Shading, dust accumulation, inverter error codes

questions.explanation: Low output ke common reasons mein shading, dust aur inverter faults shamil hain.

questions.question: Solar cables ki lifespan badhane ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Unhein open air mein chhod dena
options.B: Unhein conduits mein install karna

questions.explanation: Cables ko conduits mein install karne se woh physical damage aur environmental factors se protected rehte hain.

questions.question: Solar panel installation ke liye kaun se Indian standard (BIS) codes follow karne chahiye?

options.B: Relevant IS codes for electrical safety and solar PV installations

questions.explanation: Indian standards (BIS) codes ko follow karna zaroori hai electrical safety aur quality assurance ke liye.

questions.question: Solar system ka performance monitor karne ke liye kya use hota hai?

options.B: Monitoring apps ya web portals

questions.explanation: Monitoring apps ya web portals system ke real-time performance data ko track karne mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Battery-based solar systems mein batteries ki health check karne ke liye kya check karte hain?

options.B: Voltage, specific gravity (lead-acid), visual inspection for corrosion

questions.explanation: Battery health check karne ke liye voltage, specific gravity aur corrosion ki visual inspection zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar inverter 'no AC output' error dikha raha hai, toh kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Grid connection aur AC disconnect switch

questions.explanation: No AC output error ka matlab ho sakta hai ki grid connection loose hai ya AC disconnect switch off hai.

questions.question: Solar panel ki cleaning ke liye kaun sa material use karna chahiye?

options.B: Soft brush/cloth aur clean water (mild detergent if needed)

questions.explanation: Panels ko soft brush/cloth aur clean water se saaf karna chahiye taaki surface scratch na ho.

questions.question: Solar system ke 'preventive maintenance' ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: System ki lifespan badhana aur unexpected breakdowns kam karna

questions.explanation: Preventive maintenance system ki lifespan badhata hai aur major faults ko hone se rokta hai.

questions.question: Solar panel installation mein 'warranty' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sirf panel ka colour ki guarantee
options.B: Product ki performance aur durability ki guarantee

questions.explanation: Warranty product ki performance, material aur workmanship ki guarantee hoti hai ek specified period ke liye.

questions.question: Agar solar system mein 'reverse current flow' detect ho, toh kya action lenge?

options.B: System ko immediately disconnect karenge aur issue investigate karenge (e.g., faulty diode, wiring error)

questions.explanation: Reverse current flow system ko damage kar sakta hai, isliye immediate disconnection aur investigation zaroori hai.

questions.question: Solar panel ke 'hot spot' ko kaise identify aur rectify kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Thermal camera se detect karke aur shading remove karke ya bypass diode check karke

questions.explanation: Hot spots ko thermal camera se detect kiya jaata hai, aur rectify karne ke liye shading remove karna ya faulty bypass diode replace karna padta hai.

questions.question: Solar system ke 'performance ratio' (PR) ka kya significance hai?

options.B: System ki actual output aur theoretical output ka ratio, jo system ki overall quality batata hai

questions.explanation: Performance ratio system ki efficiency ka ek key indicator hai, jo batata hai ki system kitni achi tarah se perform kar raha hai ideal conditions ke comparison mein.

questions.question: Solar system ke end-user ko 'safety guidelines' mein kya educate karna chahiye?

options.B: Emergency shutdown procedures, do's and don'ts, monitoring system usage

questions.explanation: End-user ko system ki safety features, emergency procedures aur basic monitoring ke baare mein inform karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar solar system continuous 'low power' output de raha hai despite clear weather, toh kya advanced troubleshooting step lenge?

options.A: Inverter firmware update check karenge, panel string voltages individually measure karenge, cabling ki integrity check karenge
options.B: Sirf panel ko saaf karenge
options.C: Customer ko naya system lene ki salah denge

questions.explanation: Advanced troubleshooting mein inverter firmware, individual string voltages aur cabling ki integrity check karna shamil hai.

questions.question: Solar panel installation ke 'documentation' mein kya shamil hona chahiye?

options.B: System design drawings, equipment spec sheets, warranty info, maintenance schedule, contact details

questions.explanation: Comprehensive documentation mein system design, equipment details, warranty, maintenance plan aur contact info shamil hona chahiye.
